case_title: PRECIOUS POLK VS. CESAR AGUILAR VIRUELL

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY POLK, PRECIOUS AS TO DEFENDANT VIRUELL, CESAR AGUILAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2017 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $235.00 SERVED MAR-24-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VIRUELL, CESAR AGUILAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN PRO PER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POLK, PRECIOUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VIRUELL, CESAR AGUILAR $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $310.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,310.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 5/19/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
